reasons: Kadita is a strong Zhask counter because Zhask is vulnerable if he is caught before casting Dominator's Descent.
Kadita can quickly cross space, knock Zhask airborne, and burst him before he becomes untargetable.

proof.summary: Zhask is fragile before he enters Dominator's Descent, while Kadita can quickly cross space, set up airborne control, and burst him before he becomes untargetable.
worksBestWhen: Kadita attacks from bush or fog before Zhask casts Dominator's Descent.
Kadita waits until Zhask exits fusion if he has already used ultimate.
failureCases: Zhask casts Dominator's Descent before Kadita's burst lands.
Kadita dives into the enhanced spawn while Zhask is untargetable.
Kadita misses the setup and loses her burst window.

reasons: Franco can punish Zhask before he enters Dominator's Descent or after he exits.
Franco is preferred above Kaja here because hook plus suppression gives stronger pickoff threat from fog and objective bushes.

proof.summary: Zhask becomes hard to punish during fusion, but Franco can hook or suppress him during the vulnerable windows before Dominator's Descent or after it ends.
worksBestWhen: Franco saves hook and Bloody Hunt for Zhask's non-fusion state.
Franco controls bushes near objectives where Zhask wants to set spawn.
failureCases: Franco commits while Zhask is already fused and untargetable.
Franco hooks the spawn or a frontline target instead of Zhask.

reasons: Pharsa can pressure Zhask's setup zone from long range without walking directly into Nightmaric Spawn.
She can force Zhask to reposition or use Dominator's Descent defensively.

proof.summary: Zhask wants enemies to fight near his spawn, while Pharsa can damage and zone from outside many of Zhask's preferred threat areas.
worksBestWhen: Pharsa keeps distance and uses terrain to cast safely.
Pharsa pressures before Zhask fully controls the objective area.
failureCases: Zhask's team dives Pharsa before she can cast safely.
Pharsa wastes damage into the enhanced spawn instead of pressuring Zhask's vulnerable timing.

reasons: Lancelot can dodge some spawn pressure and punish Zhask when Dominator's Descent is unavailable.
This remains valid but is less direct than Kadita or Franco because Lancelot can also be punished if he dives into enhanced spawn timing.

proof.summary: Zhask creates a fixed danger zone around Nightmaric Spawn, while Lancelot can use mobility and invulnerability windows to enter and punish when Zhask's ultimate is down.
worksBestWhen: Lancelot waits for Zhask's ultimate or spawn reposition window to be unavailable.
Lancelot avoids fighting the enhanced spawn directly.
failureCases: Lancelot dives while Dominator's Descent is ready.
Zhask's team protects the spawn zone and locks Lancelot after his dash chain.

reasons: Kaja is valid because suppression and drag can punish Zhask outside Dominator's Descent.
Franco is still the stronger recommendation, but Kaja works as a similar suppression alternative when he can reach Zhask.

proof.summary: Zhask is punishable before or after Dominator's Descent, and Kaja can suppress and drag him during that vulnerable window.
failureCases: Zhask enters Dominator's Descent before Kaja reaches him.
Kaja has to pass through Zhask's frontline and spawn zone first.
